candidate_summary: 4-temperature-tier inference routing; ailment/query-class specific tier selection; astrologer-temporal context-window gating; per-tier max sampling budget with forced re-routing. Inspired by Bhutanese tshachu hot springs.

results.title: TURN Multi-Sample Temperature
results.rationale: Direct overlap on temperature-tier sampling for inference.

results.title: Route-and-Reason Energy-Efficient
results.rationale: Query-class routing with efficiency constraints overlaps.

results.title: Adaptive Budget Constraints
results.rationale: Per-tier max sampling budget with forced re-routing functionally equivalent to budget-constrained adaptive routing.

results.title: Select-then-Route Taxonomy
results.rationale: Ailment/taxonomy-specific routing maps directly to taxonomy-guided routing.

results.title: Temperature-Aware Scheduling
results.rationale: Temperature-aware scheduling near-identical to candidate's temperature-tier routing.

results.title: Router-R1 Multi-Round Routing
results.rationale: Forced re-routing matches multi-round routing paradigm.

decision_rationale: All 8 prior art hit. TURN (#1), Adaptive Budget (#3), and Temperature-Aware Scheduling (#6) all cross 0.7 on sem and/or func. Tshachu framing is domain-skinned composition of established temperature-tier routing + budget-constrained routing + taxonomy-guided routing. Verdict: FAIL.
